Bid.title: Bid
Bid.description: A bid placed by a user for the PC auction.

age.description: Age of the bidder (must be 18+). Stored as string from the form input.

amount.description: The bid amount in rupees, must be higher than current max bid.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when the bid was placed.

userId.description: Anonymous user ID that placed the bid.
